headlines.title: Iraq's Energy Sector Faces Its Most Important Test in Decades

headlines.title: Big Tech's Private Power Plants Will Drive Up Your Energy Bill, Experts Warn
headlines.summary: As urged by President Donald Trump, tech companies are starting to build power plants alongside their new data center campuses to provide their own energy. headlines.title: OPEC Sees Oil Demand Growth Outpacing Supply Through 2027
headlines.summary: OPEC is sticking to its view that the oil market will remain relatively tight through next year, with demand growth expected to continue outpacing non-OPEC+ supply additions despite months of war-related disruption and elevated prices. According to OPEC's June Monthly Oil Market

headlines.title: Britain’s Electric Vehicle Market Is Booming as Fuel Prices Climb
headlines.summary: Brits are racing to get their hands on electric vehicles after a surge in oil prices triggered by the war in Iran has driven away demand for petrol and diesel cars, one of the UK’s biggest used car supermarkets has said. headlines.title: Oil Held the Biggest IPO Record. Tonight It Loses the Crown.

headlines.title: China Is Learning to Use Less Oil—and That's a Bigger Deal Than It Sounds
headlines.summary: Three months into the biggest oil supply disruption in modern history, China appears to have discovered something that should make oil bulls at least a little uncomfortable.
